description: A flat circular washer with an outer diameter of 20mm, a central hole of 10.5mm, and a thickness of 2mm. It lies flat on the XY plane, centered at the origin, with the thickness extruded in the +Z direction.
notes: Create the outer cylinder with radius 10mm and height 2mm, then subtract an inner cylinder with radius 5.25mm and height 2mm (or slightly taller to ensure a clean cut). Center both cylinders at (0, 0, 0) in the XY plane, and extrude from Z=0 to Z=2.
